Training any grouping creating algorithm is fraught with gigantic "error bars". The tendency to jump trend is the bain of hands off trimming/limiting/guiding iterations. Add inherent "desired" response rewarding, some call it synching or some such, the result is the destructive echo chamber.
 It is a divisive, polarizing societal poison. The internet also creates the echo chamber due to connectivity pretty much limited to like minds. Another forcing pressure is political. 
Pump in manipulated information and voila antagonistic schism, divide and conquer. 
Somehow the  power and control must be diluted or the America as the beacon of self-governance, liberty, and opportunity will perish.
